verses.latin_vulgate: Et egredietur virga de radice Jesse,  et flos de radice ejus ascendet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָצָ֥א חֹ֖טֶר מִגֵּ֣זַע יִשָׁ֑י וְנֵ֖צֶר מִשׇּׁרָשָׁ֥יו יִפְרֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: And there shall come forth a rod out of the stem of Jesse, and a Branch shall grow out of his roots:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et requiescet super eum spiritus Domini :  spiritus sapientiæ et intellectus,  spiritus consilii et fortitudinis,  spiritus scientiæ et pietatis ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָחָ֥ה עָלָ֖יו ר֣וּחַ יְהֹוָ֑ה ר֧וּחַ חׇכְמָ֣ה וּבִינָ֗ה ר֤וּחַ עֵצָה֙ וּגְבוּרָ֔ה ר֥וּחַ דַּ֖עַת וְיִרְאַ֥ת יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And the spirit of the Lord shall rest upon him, the spirit of wisdom and understanding, the spirit of counsel and might, the spirit of knowledge and of the fear of the Lord;

verses.latin_vulgate: et replebit eum spiritus timoris Domini.  Non secundum visionem oculorum judicabit,  neque secundum auditum aurium arguet ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲרִיח֖וֹ בְּיִרְאַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹֽא־לְמַרְאֵ֤ה עֵינָיו֙ יִשְׁפּ֔וֹט וְלֹא־לְמִשְׁמַ֥ע אׇזְנָ֖יו יוֹכִֽיחַ׃
verses.king_james: And shall make him of quick understanding in the fear of the Lord: and he shall not judge after the sight of his eyes, neither reprove after the hearing of his ears:

verses.latin_vulgate: sed judicabit in justitia pauperes,  et arguet in æquitate pro mansuetis terræ ;  et percutiet terram virga oris sui,  et spiritu labiorum suorum interficiet impium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁפַ֤ט בְּצֶ֙דֶק֙ דַּלִּ֔ים וְהוֹכִ֥יחַ בְּמִישׁ֖וֹר לְעַנְוֵי־אָ֑רֶץ וְהִֽכָּה־אֶ֙רֶץ֙ בְּשֵׁ֣בֶט פִּ֔יו וּבְר֥וּחַ שְׂפָתָ֖יו יָמִ֥ית רָשָֽׁע׃
verses.king_james: But with righteousness shall he judge the poor, and reprove with equity for the meek of the earth: and he shall smite the earth with the rod of his mouth, and with the breath of his lips shall he slay the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit justitia cingulum lumborum ejus,  et fides cinctorium renum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָ֥יָה צֶ֖דֶק אֵז֣וֹר מׇתְנָ֑יו וְהָאֱמוּנָ֖ה אֵז֥וֹר חֲלָצָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: And righteousness shall be the girdle of his loins, and faithfulness the girdle of his reins.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitabit lupus cum agno,  et pardus cum hædo accubabit ;  vitulus, et leo, et ovis, simul morabuntur,  et puer parvulus minabit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגָ֤ר זְאֵב֙ עִם־כֶּ֔בֶשׂ וְנָמֵ֖ר עִם־גְּדִ֣י יִרְבָּ֑ץ וְעֵ֨גֶל וּכְפִ֤יר וּמְרִיא֙ יַחְדָּ֔ו וְנַ֥עַר קָטֹ֖ן נֹהֵ֥ג בָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: The wolf also shall dwell with the lamb, and the leopard shall lie down with the kid; and the calf and the young lion and the fatling together; and a little child shall lead them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vitulus et ursus pascentur,  simul requiescent catuli eorum ;  et leo quasi bos comedet paleas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָרָ֤ה וָדֹב֙ תִּרְעֶ֔ינָה יַחְדָּ֖ו יִרְבְּצ֣וּ יַלְדֵיהֶ֑ן וְאַרְיֵ֖ה כַּבָּקָ֥ר יֹאכַל־תֶּֽבֶן׃
verses.king_james: And the cow and the bear shall feed; their young ones shall lie down together: and the lion shall eat straw like the ox.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et delectabitur infans ab ubere super foramine aspidis ;  et in caverna reguli  qui ablactatus fuerit manum suam mittet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִֽׁעֲשַׁ֥ע יוֹנֵ֖ק עַל־חֻ֣ר פָּ֑תֶן וְעַל֙ מְאוּרַ֣ת צִפְעוֹנִ֔י גָּמ֖וּל יָד֥וֹ הָדָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And the sucking child shall play on the hole of the asp, and the weaned child shall put his hand on the cockatrice’ den.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non nocebunt, et non occident  in universo monte sancto meo,  quia repleta est terra scientia Domini, sicut aquæ maris operientes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יָרֵ֥עוּ וְלֹֽא־יַשְׁחִ֖יתוּ בְּכׇל־הַ֣ר קׇדְשִׁ֑י כִּֽי־מָלְאָ֣ה הָאָ֗רֶץ דֵּעָה֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֔ה כַּמַּ֖יִם לַיָּ֥ם מְכַסִּֽים׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: They shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain: for the earth shall be full of the knowledge of the Lord, as the waters cover the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die illa radix Jesse,  qui stat in signum populorum,  ipsum gentes deprecabuntur,  et erit sepulchrum ejus gloriosum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא שֹׁ֣רֶשׁ יִשַׁ֗י אֲשֶׁ֤ר עֹמֵד֙ לְנֵ֣ס עַמִּ֔ים אֵלָ֖יו גּוֹיִ֣ם יִדְרֹ֑שׁוּ וְהָיְתָ֥ה מְנֻחָת֖וֹ כָּבֽוֹד׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And in that day there shall be a root of Jesse, which shall stand for an ensign of the people; to it shall the Gentiles seek: and his rest shall be glorious.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa : adjiciet Dominus secundo manum suam  ad possidendum residuum populi sui,  quod relinquetur ab Assyriis, et ab Ægypto,  et a Phetros, et ab Æthiopia, et ab Ælam, et a Sennaar,  et ab Emath, et ab insulis maris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא יוֹסִ֨יף אֲדֹנָ֤י ׀ שֵׁנִית֙ יָד֔וֹ לִקְנ֖וֹת אֶת־שְׁאָ֣ר עַמּ֑וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר יִשָּׁאֵר֩ מֵאַשּׁ֨וּר וּמִמִּצְרַ֜יִם וּמִפַּתְר֣וֹס וּמִכּ֗וּשׁ וּמֵעֵילָ֤ם וּמִשִּׁנְעָר֙ וּמֵ֣חֲמָ֔ת וּמֵאִיֵּ֖י הַיָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that the Lord shall set his hand again the second time to recover the remnant of his people, which shall be left, from Assyria, and from Egypt, and from Pathros, and from Cush, and from Elam, and from Shinar, and from Hamath, and from the islands of the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et levabit signum in nationes,  et congregabit profugos Israël,  et dispersos Juda colliget  a quatuor plagis terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָשָׂ֥א נֵס֙ לַגּוֹיִ֔ם וְאָסַ֖ף נִדְחֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וּנְפֻצ֤וֹת יְהוּדָה֙ יְקַבֵּ֔ץ מֵאַרְבַּ֖ע כַּנְפ֥וֹת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: And he shall set up an ensign for the nations, and shall assemble the outcasts of Israel, and gather together the dispersed of Judah from the four corners of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et auferetur zelus Ephraim,  et hostes Juda peribunt ;  Ephraim non æmulabitur Judam,  et Judas non pugnabit contra Ephraim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְסָ֙רָה֙ קִנְאַ֣ת אֶפְרַ֔יִם וְצֹרְרֵ֥י יְהוּדָ֖ה יִכָּרֵ֑תוּ אֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ לֹא־יְקַנֵּ֣א אֶת־יְהוּדָ֔ה וִיהוּדָ֖ה לֹא־יָצֹ֥ר אֶת־אֶפְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: The envy also of Ephraim shall depart, and the adversaries of Judah shall be cut off: Ephraim shall not envy Judah, and Judah shall not vex Ephraim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et volabunt in humeros Philisthiim per mare,  simul prædabuntur filios orientis ;  Idumæa et Moab præceptum manus eorum,  et filii Ammon obedientes erunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָפ֨וּ בְכָתֵ֤ף פְּלִשְׁתִּים֙ יָ֔מָּה יַחְדָּ֖ו יָבֹ֣זּוּ אֶת־בְּנֵי־קֶ֑דֶם אֱד֤וֹם וּמוֹאָב֙ מִשְׁל֣וֹחַ יָדָ֔ם וּבְנֵ֥י עַמּ֖וֹן מִשְׁמַעְתָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: But they shall fly upon the shoulders of the Philistines toward the west; they shall spoil them of the east together: they shall lay their hand upon Edom and Moab; and the children of Ammon shall obey them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et desolabit Dominus linguam maris Ægypti,  et levabit manum suam super flumen in fortitudine spiritus sui ;  et percutiet eum in septem rivis,  ita ut transeant per eum calceati.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֶחֱרִ֣ים יְהֹוָ֗ה אֵ֚ת לְשׁ֣וֹן יָם־מִצְרַ֔יִם וְהֵנִ֥יף יָד֛וֹ עַל־הַנָּהָ֖ר בַּעְיָ֣ם רוּח֑וֹ וְהִכָּ֙הוּ֙ לְשִׁבְעָ֣ה נְחָלִ֔ים וְהִדְרִ֖יךְ בַּנְּעָלִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord shall utterly destroy the tongue of the Egyptian sea; and with his mighty wind shall he shake his hand over the river, and shall smite it in the seven streams, and make men go over dryshod.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit via residuo populo meo  qui relinquetur ab Assyriis,  sicut fuit Israëli  in die illa qua ascendit de terra Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיְתָ֣ה מְסִלָּ֔ה לִשְׁאָ֣ר עַמּ֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר יִשָּׁאֵ֖ר מֵאַשּׁ֑וּר כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר הָֽיְתָה֙ לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בְּי֥וֹם עֲלֹת֖וֹ מֵאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And there shall be an highway for the remnant of his people, which shall be left, from Assyria; like as it was to Israel in the day that he came up out of the land of Egypt.
